## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Environment
- Dashboard version: (e.g. v1.0.0)
- Kubernetes version: (e.g. v1.28.0)
- Browser: (e.g. Chrome 120)
- Auth mode: (internal / token / oidc / none)
- Deployment method: (Helm / kubectl / Docker Compose)

## Logs
```
Paste relevant server logs here (kubectl logs -n klarity deployment/klarity)
```

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.
